content.thinking:
The pods are already running v24.1.0 images (the StatefulSet was already updated to v24.1.0), but the cluster version is still showing 23.2. This means the binary upgrade has happened (the StatefulSet image was already patched to v24.1.0 and pods restarted), but the logical cluster version hasn't been finalized yet.

I need to:
1. Set `cluster.preserve_downgrade_option` to allow the upgrade to finalize (first set it to the current version to allow downgrade if needed, or clear it)
2. The standard CockroachDB upgrade flow is to set `cluster.preserve_downgrade_option` to the old version before rolling out new binaries to prevent automatic upgrade, then clear it once ready to finalize the cluster version bump.

Since the pods are already running v24.1.0 but the cluster version is still at 23.2, the binary upgrade is done and I just need to finalize by resetting the preserve_downgrade_option setting to allow the cluster to auto-upgrade to the new version.

content.text: The pods are already running v24.1.0 images but the logical cluster version is still 23.2. I need to finalize the upgrade by clearing the preserve_downgrade_option.

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW CLUSTER SETTING cluster.preserve_downgrade_option;" 2>&1
kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach node status --insecure 2>&1

content.thinking:
All 3 nodes are running v24.1.0 binaries and are available/live. The `cluster.preserve_downgrade_option` is set to '23.2', which is preventing the logical cluster version from upgrading.

Now I need to:
1. Clear `cluster.preserve_downgrade_option` to allow the cluster to finalize the upgrade to v24.1

After clearing this, the cluster should automatically migrate the logical version from 23.2 to 24.1.

content.text: All 3 nodes are running v24.1.0 binaries and are healthy. The `preserve_downgrade_option` is set to `23.2`, which is blocking finalization. I'll clear it now to allow the cluster to finalize the upgrade.

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "RESET CLUSTER SETTING cluster.preserve_downgrade_option;" 2>&1
input.description: Clear preserve_downgrade_option to allow upgrade finalization

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW CLUSTER SETTING version;" 2>&1
input.description: Check if cluster version has updated

content.thinking: The version hasn't updated yet. The cluster version migration may take a few seconds. Let me wait and check again.

content.text: The version migration may take a moment to complete. Polling until it finalizes.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  VER=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW CLUSTER SETTING version;" 2>&1 | tail -1)
  echo "Attempt $i: version=$VER"
  if echo "$VER" | grep -q "^24"; then
    echo "Upgrade finalized!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll until cluster version finalizes to 24.1
